concerns.text: SC-004 claims to measure 'methodological soundness of the threshold' against a sensitivity analysis of pre-stimulus window boundaries. However, no Functional Requirement (FR) explicitly mandates the execution of this sensitivity analysis. FR-003 defines the primary window (-500ms to 0ms) but does not require the sweep of boundaries (e.g., -600ms, -400ms) mentioned in SC-004 and the Assumptions section. This creates an orphaned success criterion with no backing FR.

SC-005 references FR-005 for the requirement to report findings as 'associational rather than causal'. However, FR-005 strictly defines the statistical execution (1000 permutations and multiple-comparison correction). The requirement to frame results as associational is actually described in User Story 3, Acceptance Scenario 3, but lacks a dedicated FR ID. SC-005 should either reference the correct FR (if one is added) or be re-anchored to the User Story directly, as FR-005 does not cover the 'framing' aspect.
